---
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
  desc-position: right
  loop: false
  css-class: "my-css-class"

execute:
  message: false
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false

---

## Proband 01

```{r}
# Library und dfs laden
library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(htmltools)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(shiny)
library(RColorBrewer)

```


::: {.panel-tabset}
### Test 1
![Test 1](images/01_1_tau.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 1](images/01_1_slow.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 1](images/01_1.html){width="1200" height="500"}

### Test 2
![Test 2](images/01_2_tau.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 2](images/01_2_slow.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 2](images/01_2.html){width="1200" height="500"}

### Test 3
![Test 3](images/01_3_tau.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 3](images/01_3_slow.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 3](images/01_3.html){width="1200" height="500"}

### Test 4
![Test 4](images/01_4_tau.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 4](images/01_4_slow.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 4](images/01_4.html){width="1200" height="500"}

### Test 5
![Test 5](images/01_5_tau.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 5](images/01_5_slow.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 5](images/01_5.html){width="1200" height="500"}

### Test 6
![Test 6](images/01_6_tau.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 6](images/01_6_slow.html){width="1200" height="500"}
![Test 6](images/01_6.html){width="1200" height="500"}

:::
